all.en: Good morning everyone, and thank you for joining the second quarter all-hands meeting today.
all.zh: 各位早安，感謝大家今天出席第二季的全員大會。

all.en: We have a packed agenda, so please review the schedule shared earlier through the corporate calendar.
all.zh: 今天議程相當豐富，請大家先參考稍早透過公司行事曆寄出的時間表。

all.en: The session will run from nine in the morning until twelve thirty, with a fifteen minute coffee break.
all.zh: 本次會議將從上午九點進行至十二點半，中間會安排十五分鐘的休息時間。

all.en: Our chief executive officer will open the meeting with a brief update on the company strategy.
all.zh: 執行長將以公司策略的簡短更新為會議揭開序幕。

all.en: She will also share the latest performance figures and the outlook for the remainder of the year.
all.zh: 她也會分享最新的營運數字以及今年剩餘時間的展望。

all.en: Following that, the chief financial officer will walk us through the revised quarterly budget.
all.zh: 接著，財務長將帶大家檢視修訂後的季度預算。

all.en: Department heads should be prepared to comment on any cost adjustments affecting their teams.
all.zh: 各部門主管請準備好針對影響自身團隊的成本調整提出說明。

all.en: The product team will then present the roadmap for the upcoming summer release cycle.
all.zh: 接著產品團隊將介紹即將到來的夏季發布週期路線圖。

all.en: Engineering leads are invited to clarify technical milestones and discuss any potential blockers.
all.zh: 工程團隊主管將釐清技術里程碑，並討論可能的阻礙因素。

all.en: After the coffee break, the marketing team will showcase the rebranded customer campaign materials.
all.zh: 中場休息後，行銷團隊將展示重新品牌化的客戶宣傳素材。

all.en: Customer success will follow with key insights drawn from recent enterprise client interviews.
all.zh: 客戶成功部門接著會分享近期企業客戶訪談所得到的重要洞察。

all.en: Human resources will then provide updates on the new hybrid work policy and recruitment plans.
all.zh: 接著人資部門將更新新的混合辦公政策以及招募計畫。

all.en: We are pleased to welcome twelve new colleagues who joined our offices over the past month.
all.zh: 我們很高興過去一個月有十二位新同事加入我們各地的辦公室。

all.en: Each newcomer will be briefly introduced, so please give them a warm round of applause.
all.zh: 每一位新進同仁都會被簡短介紹，屆時請給予熱烈的掌聲。

all.en: The information security officer will remind everyone about the updated password reset procedure.
all.zh: 資訊安全主管將提醒大家最新的密碼重設流程。

all.en: Please complete the mandatory cybersecurity training module before the end of this month.
all.zh: 請於本月底前完成必修的資訊安全訓練課程。

all.en: We will dedicate twenty minutes to open questions, so feel free to submit them in advance.
all.zh: 我們將保留二十分鐘進行公開提問，歡迎事先提交問題。

all.en: Anonymous questions can be sent through the internal feedback portal until eight tomorrow morning.
all.zh: 匿名問題可在明早八點前透過內部意見回饋平台提交。

all.en: Recordings of the meeting will be available on the shared drive within two business days.
all.zh: 會議錄影將於兩個工作天內上傳至共享雲端硬碟。

all.en: Slides and supporting documents will also be uploaded to the company intranet for reference.
all.zh: 投影片與相關文件也會上傳至公司內部網站供查閱。

all.en: Please remember to silence your mobile devices and stay muted unless you are speaking.
all.zh: 請記得將行動裝置調至靜音，未發言時保持麥克風關閉。

all.en: Remote attendees should join through the official video conferencing link sent yesterday.
all.zh: 遠端與會者請使用昨日寄出的官方視訊會議連結加入。

all.en: Thank you for your continued dedication, and let us make this another productive quarter together.
all.zh: 感謝大家持續的投入，讓我們一起再創造一個豐收的季度。

all.en: The meeting will adjourn at twelve thirty, followed by an optional team lunch on the eighth floor.
all.zh: 會議將於十二點半結束，之後在八樓有自由參加的團隊午餐。

all.en: Please RSVP for the team lunch using the link in the meeting invitation so the caterer can finalize the headcount.
all.zh: 請透過會議邀請函中的連結回覆是否參加團隊午餐，以便外燴廠商確認最終用餐人數。

all.en: Special dietary requirements, including vegetarian or gluten-free options, should be noted when submitting your lunch response.
all.zh: 如有特殊飲食需求，例如素食或無麩質選項，請於回覆午餐意願時一併註明。

all.en: Following lunch, breakout sessions will be held on the ninth floor to discuss cross-functional collaboration opportunities.
all.zh: 午餐結束後，將於九樓舉行分組討論會議，探討跨部門合作的機會。

all.en: Each breakout group will be facilitated by a senior leader and will conclude with a brief summary back to the wider team.
all.zh: 每個分組將由一位資深主管帶領，並以向全體團隊簡短回報結論作為結束。

all.en: Action items captured during the meeting will be circulated by the program management office within forty-eight hours.
all.zh: 會議中所記錄的行動項目，將由專案管理辦公室於四十八小時內彙整後寄發。

all.en: All employees are encouraged to review the action items carefully and confirm ownership of any tasks assigned to them.
all.zh: 鼓勵全體員工仔細檢視行動項目，並確認自身被指派任務的歸屬。

all.en: If you encounter any technical issues with the conferencing platform, please contact the IT help desk immediately for assistance.
all.zh: 若您在使用會議平台時遇到任何技術問題，請立即聯繫資訊技術服務台尋求協助。

all.en: We also wish to acknowledge the office support team for their excellent work in arranging today's meeting logistics.
all.zh: 我們也要感謝行政支援團隊出色地安排今日會議的相關事宜。

all.en: Looking ahead, the next all-hands meeting is tentatively scheduled for the second week of August.
all.zh: 展望未來，下一次全員大會初步排定於八月的第二週舉行。

all.en: Once again, thank you for your active participation, and please reach out to the leadership team with any additional feedback.
all.zh: 再次感謝大家踴躍參與，若有任何補充意見，敬請與領導團隊聯繫。

all.en: An anonymous feedback survey will be circulated immediately after the meeting to help us continually improve our internal communications.
all.zh: 會議結束後將立即發送匿名意見回饋問卷，協助我們持續改善內部溝通。

all.en: Department leads should submit their respective quarterly objectives to the chief operating officer no later than next Friday at five.
all.zh: 請各部門主管於下週五下午五點前，將各自的季度目標提交營運長。

all.en: Recognition awards will be announced toward the end of the agenda, celebrating colleagues nominated for outstanding contributions this quarter.
all.zh: 議程接近尾聲時將公布表揚獎項，慶賀本季因傑出貢獻而獲得提名的同仁。

all.en: Three new strategic initiatives will be introduced today, each aligned with our long-term goal of expanding into adjacent markets.
all.zh: 今日將介紹三項新的策略性計畫，每一項皆與我們進軍鄰近市場的長期目標相符。

all.en: The legal department will provide a short update on recent regulatory developments that may affect our compliance obligations going forward.
all.zh: 法務部門將簡短更新近期法規動態，這些動態可能影響本公司日後的法規遵循義務。

all.en: Sustainability initiatives launched last quarter have already contributed to a measurable reduction in our overall corporate carbon footprint.
all.zh: 上一季啟動的永續計畫，已對本公司整體企業碳足跡帶來可量化的下降。

all.en: Polls embedded into the presentation will allow remote attendees to participate in real time using their mobile devices.
all.zh: 嵌入簡報中的投票功能將讓遠端與會者透過行動裝置即時參與。

all.en: Please note that meeting minutes will be distributed in three working languages to support our global workforce.
all.zh: 請注意，會議紀錄將以三種工作語言發送，以服務我們的全球員工。

all.en: We encourage employees to share short photo updates from the breakout sessions on the internal social platform later this afternoon.
all.zh: 我們鼓勵員工於今日稍晚在內部社群平台上分享分組會議的簡短照片紀錄。

all.en: Have a productive day, and we look forward to celebrating our shared successes during the closing remarks at twelve thirty.
all.zh: 祝大家有個豐收的一天，我們期待於十二點半的結語時段一同慶賀共同的成果。

all.en: Quick heads-up: if you grabbed coffee from the lobby cart on the way in, please remember not to put your mug down on the projector cables again like last quarter.
all.zh: 提醒一下：如果你進來時有去大廳的咖啡車點咖啡，請記得不要再像上一季一樣把馬克杯放在投影機線材上。

all.en: If anyone has trouble seeing the slides from the back row, please raise your hand now, since we have a few empty seats closer to the front.
all.zh: 如果坐在後排的人看不清楚投影片，請現在舉手示意，前面還有幾個空位可以坐。

all.en: By the way, the office cat Mochi will be making her usual cameo appearance during the welcome video, so please try not to get distracted when she chases the laser pointer.
all.zh: 順帶一提，辦公室貓咪 Mochi 將會在歡迎影片中照例客串演出，當她追雷射筆時請大家盡量別分心。

all.en: For those joining from Singapore, we know it's already late evening on your side, so please feel free to drop off after the marketing segment if needed.
all.zh: 對於從新加坡連線的同仁，我們知道你們那邊已經很晚了，如果需要的話，行銷段落結束後可以先離線。

all.en: A few of you have asked whether we can move next quarter's meeting to a Friday afternoon, and honestly, we are seriously considering it based on the recent feedback.
all.zh: 有幾位同仁問是否能把下季會議改到週五下午，老實說我們根據最近的回饋正在認真考慮這個建議。

all.en: Sarah from accounting baked her famous lemon bars again for the lunch table, so please head upstairs early if you want to grab one before they disappear.
all.zh: 會計部的 Sarah 又為午餐桌烤了她拿手的檸檬塔，想吃的人請早點上樓，不然很快就會被掃光。

all.en: If you're new and unsure who to sit with at lunch, just look for the buddy table near the window, where last quarter's newcomers usually gather for an informal hello.
all.zh: 如果你是新進同仁不知道午餐要跟誰坐，可以找窗邊的 buddy 桌，上一季的新進同仁通常會在那裡輕鬆地打招呼。

all.en: We will keep recognition awards short this time because last quarter the applause carried on so long that the next presenter completely lost track of his opening line.
all.zh: 這次表揚獎項的環節會盡量精簡，因為上一季掌聲持續太久，下一位簡報者完全忘了他開場要說什麼。

all.en: If you feel a question coming up but get shy in the moment, please drop it in the anonymous channel later, because we genuinely read every single one of them.
all.zh: 如果你想到問題但當下不好意思開口，可以稍後把問題丟到匿名管道，我們真的會逐則閱讀每一個提問。

all.en: Finally, please don't forget to refill the water pitchers at your tables, and a huge thanks in advance to everyone who helps clean up after the meeting wraps.
all.zh: 最後，請別忘了為桌上的水壺添水，並先在此衷心感謝會議結束後願意幫忙整理場地的每一位同仁。
